claimText: Compressed Biogas (CBG) is produced by purifying raw biogas to remove hydrogen sulfide, carbon dioxide, and water vapor, achieving a methane concentration of 90%.
evidenceExcerpt: Raw biogas is purified to remove H2S, CO2, and water vapor, increasing methane concentration to 90%
examUse: Statement-based question on the composition and purification process of CBG.
distractorHooks: Removes oxygen and nitrogen instead of H2S and CO2

claimText: To produce Compressed Biogas (CBG), purified biogas is compressed to a pressure of 200-250 bar.
evidenceExcerpt: and is then compressed to about 200-250 bar pressure to get CBG.
examUse: Statement-based question on the physical properties and production of CBG.

claimText: The GOBAR-DHAN scheme aims to convert cattle dung and farm solid waste into Bio-CNG (CBG) and compost.
evidenceExcerpt: The GOBAR-DHAN scheme focuses on converting cattle dung and farm solid waste into Bio-CNG (CBG) and compost.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching schemes to their objectives.

claimText: The SATAT initiative is designed to establish Compressed Biogas (CBG) plants to provide an affordable transportation fuel.
evidenceExcerpt: The SATAT initiative aims to set up Compressed Biogas (CBG) plants for affordable transportation.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question matching schemes to their objectives.
distractorHooks: SATAT is for solar panel manufacturing
SATAT is for electric vehicle charging stations
